_meta.description: Machine-readable task queue for multi-agent coordination. Agents claim tasks by setting status=in_progress + claimed_by + claimed_at, then commit+push immediately. The markdown work-queue.md is the human-readable companion. This file is the source of truth for automation.
rules: CLAIM before starting: set status=in_progress, claimed_by, claimed_at, then commit+push
Only one agent per task at a time
Stale claims (>4h with no commit) are expired automatically by session_start.py
DONE tasks stay in completed[] for 14 days then archived
